overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character traversing Night City at dusk. The clip progresses from a sidewalk beside elevated highways, through covered underpasses, past a neon-lit canal with holographic advertisements, and concludes with the character running along a busy city sidewalk. The environment features characteristic cyberpunk aesthetics including neon signage, futuristic architecture, and dense urban infrastructure.

events.description: crossing the street at the marked crosswalk
entering the covered area beneath the elevated highway overpass

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk and crossing the street at the intersection

notable_agents.action: black car waiting at the red traffic light

entered.detail: large concrete and steel highway ramp running parallel to the sidewalk
smooth concrete barrier separating sidewalk from the highway structure
tall pole with bright white lamp illuminating the street
distant buildings with green and blue neon lighting visible in the background
white striped pedestrian crossing on the asphalt
red traffic signal visible at the intersection

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a concrete sidewalk beside an elevated highway structure in a futuristic city at dusk. The camera moves forward past a street light and approaches a crosswalk where a black car waits at a red light. The environment features neon-lit buildings in the distance and the scene transitions as it enters the shadow of the overhead highway ramp.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered roadway under multiple highway overpasses

events.description: entering deep shadow beneath the highway overpasses, artificial lighting becomes dominant

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered highway underpass area

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure overhead with support beams
thick cylindrical pillars supporting the overhead highway
large metal pipes running along the right side of the corridor
glowing pink and blue signage visible at the end of the tunnel

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow enclosed corridor beneath multiple highway overpasses. The natural dusk light is replaced by artificial street lighting as the camera moves through the concrete tunnel. Industrial piping lines the right wall while massive support pillars flank the road. The atmosphere is industrial and sheltered from the open sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial district with canal and holographic billboards

events.description: emerging from underpass into open commercial area with bright neon signage
turning left to look down into the water canal

agents.ego_description: approaching the commercial district and pausing to observe the canal and cityscape

entered.detail: large building with prominent circular pink neon sign and japanese text
concrete-lined water channel running through the city with reflective water
steep concrete embankments with drainage pipes lining the waterway
large floating digital advertisements displaying food and products
tall futuristic glass and steel buildings with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass, the scene opens into a vibrant commercial district illuminated by neon and holographic advertisements. The camera approaches a building with a large pink pachinko sign, then turns to reveal a concrete canal waterway cutting through the city. Massive holographic billboards float above the canal while futuristic skyscrapers rise in the background, creating a dense cyberpunk cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with palm trees and commercial storefronts

events.description: transitioning from walking to running along the sidewalk
passing pedestrians while running along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: running along the city sidewalk past other pedestrians and palm trees

notable_agents.action: person walking in the opposite direction on the sidewalk

entered.detail: concrete divider separating the sidewalk from the street
tall palm tree in a planter on the sidewalk
black metal security fence with pointed tops
modern building facade with illuminated signage and glass windows

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character running along a city sidewalk bordered by a metal fence and palm trees. The camera follows from behind as the character passes other pedestrians walking in the opposite direction. Commercial buildings with neon signage line the right side while the road runs parallel on the left. The pace increases from walking to running as the character navigates the urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic city at dusk, transitioning from the shadows of industrial overpasses into a vibrant, neon-lit commercial district. It begins on a concrete sidewalk beside an elevated highway, moving past a waiting black car before slipping into the deep shadows of an overhead ramp. As the camera enters a narrow enclosed corridor, the natural dusk light is replaced by artificial street lighting and industrial piping beneath massive concrete support pillars. The scene then opens into a brilliant cityscape of holographic billboards and pink pachinko signs, revealing a concrete canal flanked by towering skyscrapers. Finally, the camera accelerates as the character begins running along a sidewalk bordered by palm trees and metal fences, passing pedestrians amidst a dense array of neon commercial buildings.
